summary: W870 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while composing W851 comparison-selected-cochain data with the W869 stable-ExactAt route. From one W735 exact-input branch, W870 checks direct bounded left calculus through W831/W869 and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W831/W869. Product success remains false because concrete W735 exact-input data, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W870 removes W869's explicit W736 comparison-isomorphism input using W831, but still requires one concrete W735 exact-input branch.
Concrete W735 exact-input data is not yet fully instantiated; the latest route boundary is one closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block one concrete W735 exact-input branch now isolated by W870.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
